title: Music Disc Resourcepack
description: Replaces the music of 6 Minecraft jukebox discs with custom tracks.
body:
**Description**

This resource pack replaces the original music of six Minecraft jukebox discs with custom tracks, while keeping everything else exactly the same as vanilla.

Only the audio has been changed. Disc names, textures, crafting, and jukebox behavior remain untouched. The goal of this pack is to refresh the in-game music experience without altering gameplay or performance.

**Replaced music discs:**

[1] 13

[2] Chirp

[3] Mall

[4] Precipice

[5] Relic

[6] Wait

The pack is lightweight, works in both survival and creative mode, and does not require any mods. Just install it like a normal resource pack and enjoy new music from the jukebox.
